analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet claims the EU sacrificed its own geoeconomic and strategic interests to satisfy a short-term desire to align with the US in 'punishing' Russia, and links to Lavrov’s interview. Evaluation: RU1 (The West and their allies are immoral, hostile and decadent) – Applicable. The tweet portrays the EU/US as acting vindictively and irrationally ('momentary desire to punish Russia') and against their own interests, casting the West as hostile toward Russia. RU2 – Not supported; no promotion of an alternative non-Western system or multipolar cooperation. RU3 – Not supported; no depiction of Russia as a benevolent partner. RU4 – Not supported; no historical glorification. RU5 – Not supported; no claims of Russian forefront achievements. RU6 – Not supported; no cultural/nature content. Conclusion: Only RU1 fits.
